# GitHub Agentic Workflows

> Agent-optimised prompt files for GitHub Agentic Workflows (gh-aw).
> These markdown files are designed for AI agents and LLMs, not human readers.

## Agent Prompts

- [agentic-chat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/agentic-chat.md): AI assistant for creating clear, actionable task descriptions for GitHub Copilot coding agent
- [agentic-workflows-mcp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/agentic-workflows-mcp.md): agentic-workflows MCP server tool reference for workflows that call status, logs, audit, or compile
- [asciicharts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/asciicharts.md): Guidance for generating compact ASCII charts that render cleanly in GitHub markdown surfaces.
- [campaign](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/campaign.md)
- [charts-trending](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/charts-trending.md): Full trending-analysis patterns, best practices, and reporting guidance for chart workflows.
- [charts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/charts.md): Guidance for adding Python data visualization to agentic workflows with compact setup patterns and links to the full trending guide.
- [cli-commands](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/cli-commands.md): Complete reference for gh aw CLI commands and their MCP tool equivalents for restricted environments
- [context](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/context.md): GitHub context expression variables and Handlebars-style template conditionals ({{#if}}) for agentic workflows.
- [create-agentic-workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/create-agentic-workflow.md): Create new agentic workflows using GitHub Agentic Workflows (gh-aw) with concise guidance on triggers, tools, and security.
- [create-shared-agentic-workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/create-shared-agentic-workflow.md): Create shared agentic workflow components that wrap MCP servers using secure, reusable patterns.
- [debug-agentic-workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/debug-agentic-workflow.md): Debug and refine agentic workflows using gh-aw CLI tools and focused run-log analysis.
- [dependabot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/dependabot.md): Instructions for fixing Dependabot PRs that update dependencies in generated workflow manifest files
- [deployment-status](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/deployment-status.md): Reference pattern for monitoring external deployment failures using the deployment_status trigger and creating incident issues automatically.
- [experiments](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/experiments.md): Guide for setting up A/B testing experiments in agentic workflows — syntax, design principles, dimensions to test, how to measure results, and anti-patterns.
- [github-agentic-workflows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/github-agentic-workflows.md): GitHub Agentic Workflows
- [github-mcp-server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/github-mcp-server.md)
- [llms](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/llms.md): Discover LLM API endpoints, ports, and available model names inside the AWF agent container using the api-proxy /reflect endpoint.
- [mcp-clis](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/mcp-clis.md): MCP CLI command usage guidance and JSON payload patterns
- [memory](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/memory.md): Guide for choosing the right persistent memory strategy in agentic workflows — cache-memory, repo-memory, and repo-memory with wiki. Covers deduplication, stateful baseline comparison (metrics/coverage), and stateful scanning ("alert on new X").
- [messages](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/messages.md): Style guide for workflow status messages (all safe-outputs.messages template types).
- [network](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/network.md): Network access configuration reference for gh-aw workflows — valid ecosystem identifiers, domain patterns, and common mistakes to avoid.
- [optimize-agentic-workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/optimize-agentic-workflow.md): Analyze and reduce token consumption in agentic workflows — audit-based measurement, DataOps, gh-proxy, sub-agents, and prompt optimization.
- [patterns](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/patterns.md): Agentic workflow pattern router for selecting the best documented pattern and playbook.
- [pr-reviewer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/pr-reviewer.md): Guidance for implementing PR reviewer agentic workflows with ready_for_review triggers, centralized slash commands, and safe review actions.
- [report](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/report.md): Guidelines for creating agentic workflows that generate reports — output type selection, formatting style, and automatic cleanup.
- [reuse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/reuse.md): Imports, shared components, import-schema, and gh aw add/update for GitHub Agentic Workflows
- [safe-outputs-automation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/safe-outputs-automation.md): Safe-output reference for workflow dispatch, code scanning, checks, agent sessions, and assignment operations.
- [safe-outputs-content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/safe-outputs-content.md): Safe-output reference for issue, discussion, comment, and pull request content operations.
- [safe-outputs-management](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/safe-outputs-management.md): Safe-output reference for update, label, milestone, project, release, and upload operations.
- [safe-outputs-runtime](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/safe-outputs-runtime.md): Safe-output reference for runtime defaults, custom jobs, scripts, actions, global configuration, and output variables.
- [safe-outputs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/safe-outputs.md): Compact index for safe-output operations and runtime configuration in GitHub Agentic Workflows.
- [serena-tool](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/serena-tool.md)
- [shared-safe-jobs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/shared-safe-jobs.md): Shared pattern for custom safe-output jobs that consume structured agent output.
- [skills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/skills.md): Guide for leveraging skills (SKILL.md files) in agentic workflows — hint, fusion, and inline fusion strategies
- [subagents](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/subagents.md): Guide for defining inline sub-agents in workflow markdown files — syntax, engine placement, frontmatter fields, and best practices.
- [syntax-agentic](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/syntax-agentic.md): Agentic workflow specific frontmatter fields for GitHub Agentic Workflows.
- [syntax-core](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/syntax-core.md): Core GitHub Actions frontmatter fields supported by GitHub Agentic Workflows.
- [syntax-tools-imports](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/syntax-tools-imports.md): Cache, tool, import, and permission reference for GitHub Agentic Workflows frontmatter.
- [syntax](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/syntax.md): Compact index for the GitHub Agentic Workflows frontmatter schema.
- [test-coverage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/test-coverage.md): Guidance for creating agentic workflows that analyze test coverage — prefer reading pre-computed CI artifacts over re-running tests.
- [test-expression](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/test-expression.md)
- [token-optimization](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/token-optimization.md): Guide for reducing token consumption in agentic workflows — DataOps, gh-proxy, inline sub-agents, caveman experiments, and audit-based measurement.
- [triggers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/triggers.md): Trigger patterns for GitHub Agentic Workflows — events, fuzzy scheduling, fork security, slash commands, and label commands.
- [update-agentic-workflow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/update-agentic-workflow.md): Update existing agentic workflows using GitHub Agentic Workflows (gh-aw) with concise guidance on minimal changes and validation.
- [upgrade-agentic-workflows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/upgrade-agentic-workflows.md): Upgrade agentic workflows to the latest version of gh-aw with automated compilation and error fixing
- [visual-regression](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/visual-regression.md): Reference prompt for visual regression testing using playwright + cache-memory for baseline screenshot storage across pull requests
- [workflow-constraints](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/workflow-constraints.md): Shared architectural and security constraints for designing or updating agentic workflows.
- [workflow-editing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/workflow-editing.md): Shared guidance for editing, recompiling, and validating GitHub Agentic Workflow files.
- [workflow-patterns](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/main/.github/aw/workflow-patterns.md): Shared design patterns for command workflows, monitoring workflows, large-repository workflows, database migration reviews, and cross-repository operations.
